name: Hope Gunlance I
description:
A gunlance made specifically for
the expedition. Uses a variety
of shells and a Wyrmstake
cannon for attacks.

name: Hope Gunlance II
description:
A gunlance made specifically for
the expedition. Uses a variety
of shells and a Wyrmstake
cannon for attacks.

name: Hope Gunlance III
description:
A gunlance made specifically for
the expedition. Uses a variety
of shells and a Wyrmstake
cannon for attacks.

name: Hope Gunlance IV
description:
A gunlance made specifically for
the expedition. Uses a variety
of shells and a Wyrmstake
cannon for attacks.

name: Hope Gunlance V
description:
A gunlance made specifically for
the expedition. Uses a variety
of shells and a Wyrmstake
cannon for attacks.

name: Bone Gunlance I
description:
A light and wieldy gunlance
that's great for beginners
to learn the ropes and hone
their skills.

name: Bone Gunlance II
description:
A light and wieldy gunlance
that's great for beginners
to learn the ropes and hone
their skills.

name: Bone Gunlance III
description:
A light and wieldy gunlance
that's great for beginners
to learn the ropes and hone
their skills.

name: Bone Gunlance IV
description:
A light and wieldy gunlance
that's great for beginners
to learn the ropes and hone
their skills.

name: Great Bone Gunlance
description:
Top-shelf materials have turned
the Bone Gunlance into a great-
handling weapon that's ready for
real action.

name: Triple Bayonet I
description:
A gunlance with three bayonets.
Is it for beginners? No. Will it
make you look amazing? Oh, yes.

name: Triple Bayonet II
description:
A gunlance with three bayonets.
Is it for beginners? No. Will it
make you look amazing? Oh, yes.

name: Triple Bayonet III
description:
A gunlance with three bayonets.
Is it for beginners? No. Will it
make you look amazing? Oh, yes.

name: Triumvirate Edge
description:
An upgraded Triple Bayonet,
made by a dedicated craftsman.
The scars inflicted by its
blade are visible at a glance.

name: Quematrice Culebrina I
description:
A Quematrice gunlance that
ignites gas on each discharge
to deliver an additional punch.

name: Quematrice Culebrina II
description:
A Quematrice gunlance that
ignites gas on each discharge
to deliver an additional punch.

name: Quematrice Culebrina III
description:
A Quematrice gunlance that
ignites gas on each discharge
to deliver an additional punch.

name: Quematrice Culebrina IV
description:
A Quematrice gunlance that
ignites gas on each discharge
to deliver an additional punch.

name: Firetrail Quemador
description:
An upgraded Quematrice
Culebrina. Its hellfire
abates only when there is
no prey left to destroy.

name: Balahara Exploder I
description:
A Balahara gunlance with a
powder magazine that is
engineered to be heat and
water resistant.

name: Balahara Exploder II
description:
A Balahara gunlance with a
powder magazine that is
engineered to be heat and
water resistant.

name: Balahara Exploder III
description:
A Balahara gunlance with a
powder magazine that is
engineered to be heat and
water resistant.

name: Balahara Exploder IV
description:
A Balahara gunlance with a
powder magazine that is
engineered to be heat and
water resistant.

name: Sandsea Visponan
description:
An upgraded Balahara Exploder.
Capable of reducing mountains
to sand, flowing like water.

name: Uth Falarmata I
description:
An Uth Duna gunlance wreathed
in its elegant veil. Captivating
beauty belies fearsome power.

name: Uth Falarmata II
description:
An Uth Duna gunlance wreathed
in its elegant veil. Captivating
beauty belies fearsome power.

name: Uth Falarmata III
description:
An Uth Duna gunlance wreathed
in its elegant veil. Captivating
beauty belies fearsome power.

name: Falarmata-of-the-Waves
description:
An upgraded Uth Falarmata. The
torrents trapped within await
their unleashing as a terrible
flood.

name: Shell Gunberd I
description:
A Nerscylla gunlance that
layers arcs of material to
achieve lightness, strength,
and a comfortable grip.

name: Shell Gunberd II
description:
A Nerscylla gunlance that
layers arcs of material to
achieve lightness, strength,
and a comfortable grip.

name: Shell Gunberd III
description:
A Nerscylla gunlance that
layers arcs of material to
achieve lightness, strength,
and a comfortable grip.

name: Solid Gunberd
description:
An upgraded Shell Gunberd.
Delicate it may look, but
its lack of rigidity is
what makes it strong.

name: Ajara Gunpike I
description:
An Ajarakan gunlance that
produces high-powered blasts
of heat to instantly remove
all in its path.

name: Ajara Gunpike II
description:
An Ajarakan gunlance that
produces high-powered blasts
of heat to instantly remove
all in its path.

name: Ajara-Kalika
description:
An Ajara Gunpike by its true
name. Arrogantly, and with an
absence of mercy, it eradicates
all defiers.

name: Albirath Rook I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos gunlance.
Like a blazing fire, its wielder's
spirit never abates.

name: Albirath Rook II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos gunlance.
Like a blazing fire, its wielder's
spirit never abates.

name: Shining Rook
description:
An upgraded Albirath Rook.
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Jin Dhatop I
description:
A gunlance that uses Jin
Dahaad's cooling mechanisms
to issue subzero thrusts and
searing gunfire.

name: Precipice Lohamata
description:
An upgraded Jin Dhatop with
the defenses of a sturdy ice
wall, and gunfire like a
merciless avalanche.

name: G. Veldian Hasta I
description:
A gunlance made from Guardian
spoils. It instills one with
a desire to oppose the strong
for the weak.

name: G. Veldian Hasta II
description:
A gunlance made from Guardian
spoils. It instills one with
a desire to oppose the strong
for the weak.

name: G. Lawful Bors
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Hasta.
A shield to end all suffering,
and a lance to obliterate
injustice.

name: Hard Hitter I
description:
An enormous gunlance that
combines flexible leather
with quality ore, and packs
a very poisonous bite.

name: Hard Hitter II
description:
An enormous gunlance that
combines flexible leather
with quality ore, and packs
a very poisonous bite.

name: Big Slugger
description:
An upgraded Hard Hitter. The
liquid poison it spews puts
targets through terrible agony
before they expire.

name: Princess Panoply I
description:
An elegant gunlance clad in
green Rathian scales. Its
venom takes lives as scarlet
blossoms burst from its muzzle.

name: Princess Panoply II
description:
An elegant gunlance clad in
green Rathian scales. Its
venom takes lives as scarlet
blossoms burst from its muzzle.

name: Ortlinde
description:
The upgraded Princess Panoply,
a verdant garden of death
imbued with the Queen of
the Land's soul.

name: Warring Fulgur I
description:
A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath
gunlance. Only one able to tame
its brutality through reason can
wield it.

name: Fulgurcannon Guardiana
description:
An upgraded Warring Fulgur.
Its savage urges thwart reason
and will destroy an overeager
wielder.

name: White Gunlance I
description:
A gunlance with lava-proof
Gravios plating in the barrel
and shield, yielding formidable
resistance.

name: White Cannon
description:
An upgraded White Gunlance.
Like a catastrophe, it eradicates
everything in volcanic smoke.

name: Jaya Gunlance I
description:
Forged from a Seregios blade,
the echo of this gunlance
resembles a cannon salute that
heralds the dawn of rebellion.

name: Riotous Gunlance
description:
Declare war on the gods and
be victorious with this upgraded
Jaya Gunlance.

name: Red Rook I
description:
A gunlance that exemplifies
Rathalos's might, each roar a
fiery melody hastening prey
to their deaths.

name: Crimson Rook
description:
An upgraded Red Rook.
Tonight, its scarlet hellfire
will feast on another legion
of souls.

name: Tyrannenarm I
description:
This Gore Magala gunlance's
piercing gaze wills its prey
to surrender—then destroys
them, flesh and soul.

name: Verräterarm
description:
An upgraded Tyrannenarm.
Its gaze sees prey for all
their sins before sentencing
them to the abyss.

name: Veldian Hasta I
description:
An Arkveld gunlance. Every
breath taken by the knight
that bore one was in service
to the people.

name: Paretic Gunlance I
description:
A gunlance with a striking
black blade and paralytic
agents. Watch out for its
potent red edge.

name: Paretic Gunlance II
description:
A gunlance with a striking
black blade and paralytic
agents. Watch out for its
potent red edge.

name: Paretic Gunlance III
description:
A gunlance with a striking
black blade and paralytic
agents. Watch out for its
potent red edge.

name: Paretic Gunlance IV
description:
A gunlance with a striking
black blade and paralytic
agents. Watch out for its
potent red edge.

name: Debilitating Torpor
description:
An upgraded Paretic Gunlance.
Each flash blooms like a rose—
and its thorns will stop prey
dead.

name: Artian Cannon I
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The firing
mechanism still functions after
all this time.

name: Artian Cannon II
description:
A weapon assembled from
unearthed fragments. The firing
mechanism still functions after
all this time.

name: Argenesis
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. Its restored control
mechanism makes it nigh
unstoppable.

name: Esperanza Gunlance
description:
A fully field-tested Hope
Gunlance. Arm yourself with
faith in tomorrow, and let
the Wyvern Fire fly!

name: Lawful Bors
description:
An upgraded Veldian Hasta.
With it, a haughty wyvern
that rose against nature
was returned to the earth.

name: Zoh Lael I
description:
A Zoh Shia gunlance that's
as raucous as the applause
it was received with.

name: Blazing Lael
description:
Lael harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest praise,
may shrieks of terror be
thy hymn.

name: Ukiyo no Yamiwo I
description:
A resplendent gunlance.
Once owned by a samurai,
it twinkles in the moonlight.

name: Mizumori
description:
The Ukiyo no Yamiwo's
upgraded form shimmers
morosely within the mist.

name: Cornpopper
description:
A gunlance born from a corny
dedication to farming. Looks
aside, it's got good pop.

name: Mighty Cornpopper
description:
The Cornpopper's upgraded
form. Achieving a good
harvest is all in the mind!

name: Lagia Burst I
description:
A coiled gunlance with the might
of a Lagiacrus. It fires lightning
against which nothing can stand.

name: Exlagia Gunlance
description:
The Lagia Burst's upgraded
form pierces the heavens
with its thunderous fury.

name: Auguring Omen
description:
Grotesque agony that thirsts
for potential, its sigils pulsing
as they await the coming demise.

name: Auguring Omen
description:
Grotesque agony that thirsts
for potential, its sigils pulsing
as they await the coming demise.

name: Auguring Omen
description:
Grotesque agony that thirsts
for potential, its sigils pulsing
as they await the coming demise.
